presets.name: Stock

presets.desc_en: Safe baseline. CPU 3500 MHz, GPU 1500 MHz.

presets.name: Performance

presets.desc_en: Balanced + undervolted. CPU 3700 MHz ~1106 mV, GPU 2000 MHz.

presets.name: Turbo

presets.desc_en: High boost. CPU 3900 MHz ~1199 mV (undervolt), GPU 2200 MHz.

presets.name: Crazy
